<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update communication preferences"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v1/parties/{partyId}/preferences"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Update a party's communication preferences. This is a full replacement —
omitted fields are cleared.

Use `optedOut: true` to globally suppress all communications for a party.
Use `channelOptOuts` to suppress specific channels while allowing others.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
